|---|----------|-----------------|---------------|
| 1 | `Condition` | Hyperthyroidism dx (SNOMED `34486009` = Hyperthyroidism; `353295004` = Disorder of thyroid) | Multi-code OR via comma |
| 2 | `MedicationRequest` | Methimazole prescriptions (RxNorm `6835`) | Active antithyroid drug |

```python

patients_dx   = {c["subject"]["reference"] for c in condition_bundle["entry"]}
patients_med  = {m["subject"]["reference"] for m in medrx_bundle["entry"]}
patients_tsh  = {o["subject"]["reference"] for o in obs_bundle["entry"]}

cohort = patients_dx | patients_med | patients_tsh

```

- **`_include=*:subject`** pulls `Patient` resources alongside each result to resolve IDs in one round-trip.
